messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0094",
  "title": "2025年",
  "page_index": 27,
  "page_range": "27"
}

Section text:
### 2025年
- 1-10名收入占比：23.24%
- 11-50名收入占比：28.34%
- 51-200名收入占比：25.37%
- 其他移动游戏收入占比：23.05%

message.content: This section provides statistical metrics on the 2025 mobile game market revenue distribution. It answers retrieval questions regarding the revenue share percentages across four specific ranking tiers: top 1–10 (23.24%), ranks 11–50 (28.34%), ranks 51–200 (25.37%), and other mobile games (23.05%). The content serves as quantitative evidence for analyzing market concentration, revenue fragmentation, and competitive landscape within the mobile gaming sector for the year 2025.
